candidate_metadata.error: CUDA out of memory. Tried to allocate 136.06 GiB. GPU 1 has a total capacity of 47.44 GiB of which 26.80 GiB is free. Including non-PyTorch memory, this process has 20.62 GiB memory in use. Of the allocated memory 13.58 GiB is allocated by PyTorch, and 6.72 GiB is reserved by PyTorch but unallocated. If reserved but unallocated memory is large try setting PYTORCH_CUDA_ALLOC_CONF=expandable_segments:True to avoid fragmentation.  See documentation for Memory Management  (https://pytorch.org/docs/stable/notes/cuda.html#environment-variables)

metadata.description: Global deterministic JOILang generation rules and schema-faithful behavior.
Main JOILang generator block with deterministic JSON-only output and schema-grounded exemplars.
Final JOILang output scrubber that enforces JSON shape and strips explanation drift.
Diagnostic helper block enumerating the evaluator targets so the generator avoids common failures.
